leadText: Fairy Wind (Japanese: ようせいのかぜ Fairy Wind) is a damage-dealing Fairy-type move introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Fairy Wind inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Fairy Wind is a wind move . sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user stirs up a fairy wind and strikes the target with it. S V The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target. ZA The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike targets.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.
